CVE-2021-38714.title: In Plib through 1.85, there is an integer overflow vulnerability  ...
CVE-2021-38714.summary: In Plib through 1.85, there is an integer overflow vulnerability that could result in arbitrary code execution. The vulnerability is found in ssgLoadTGA() function in src/ssg/ssgLoadTGA.cxx file.
